actions.intent: Start the priority lower rescue route and break crate tax.
Open the lower route to one-clear-away.
Stabilize dock while preparing the upper pivot.
Use clean side material before the key ice break.
Break the lower frozen route and extract the priority puppy.
Break the upper ice route before water forces panic.
Bring the upper target to one-clear-away.
Cash a dock clear before the final route action.
Finish the upper rescue and prove the band skill.

notes: Designer golden for the ice future-value capstone: lower frozen route first, then a controlled upper pivot.
